payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple framed molding; vertical wood grain and slightly worn finish with a lighter glossy patch near the lower center — photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
